subcodes.first_line: O namesake of the divine sacrifice, like thy namesake in the field of martyrdom: "O father, do as thou art bidden; thou shalt find me steadfast." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی ذبیح الهی همنامت در میدان قربانی یا ابت افعل ما تومر ستجدنی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
